channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Hurricane Trump threatens to blow China off course
item.description: "Get ready for the storm of the century. Hurricane Trump is brewing and it's got China in its sights. With tensions rising and trade wars looming, can China weather the storm or will it be blown off course? Read the full article here: https://www.economist.com/international/2026/03/31/hurricane-trump-threatens-to-blow-china-off-course and join the conversation in the comments below."
